title: The Girl of My Heart
writer: Mildred Considine, Edward LeSaint, Frances Marian Mitchell
actors: Shirley Mason, Raymond McKee, Martha Mattox
plot: On Christmas Eve, the orphaned Joan escapes a cruel mistress and finds refuge at the White family estate. After Joan convinces young Rodney White, who suffers from white plague, not to take his own life, he takes her out West, alo...
